ui.hero_description: Simply snap a photo of any menu, and AI instantly reveals dish details, translations, and reviews.
ui.hero_description_line2: Make your dining experience smarter and more delicious.
ui.no_results: No results yet. Upload a menu image to get started!

api_key_modal.title: API Settings
api_key_modal.description: Menu analysis requires an AI API.
api_key_modal.get_key_text: You can get your API key from
api_key_modal.storage_notice: ※ API key is stored in browser's localStorage and never sent to server.
api_key_modal.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the API key?
api_key_modal.provider_not_implemented: This provider is not yet implemented. Please select Claude for now.

toast.api_key_invalid: API key is invalid or not set. Please enter your API key in the settings.
toast.api_key_setup: Please set up your API key
toast.network_error: Network error: Please check your connection
toast.network_error_server: Network error: Cannot connect to server.
toast.file_too_large: File size is too large. Please select an image under 10MB.
toast.unsupported_format: Unsupported image format. Please select JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
toast.multiple_files: Only one image can be processed at a time

loading.step2_sub: AI is reading the menu items

results.title: Analysis Results
results.hover_hint: Hover over numbers to highlight corresponding dishes

ai_prompt.system_message: This image is a restaurant menu. Please extract the following information for each dish in the image in JSON format.
ai_prompt.field_original_name: original_name: Original dish name (as written on the menu)
ai_prompt.field_translated_name: translated_name: Dish name translated into English (if not already in English, translate it)
ai_prompt.field_description: description: Dish description (approximately 50 words in English)
ai_prompt.field_spiciness: spiciness: Spiciness level (integer from 1 to 5, where 1=not spicy, 5=very spicy)
ai_prompt.field_sweetness: sweetness: Sweetness level (integer from 1 to 5, where 1=not sweet, 5=very sweet)
ai_prompt.field_ingredients: ingredients: List of main ingredients (in English)
ai_prompt.field_allergens: allergens: List of allergens (in English, e.g., eggs, dairy, wheat, soba, peanuts, shrimp, crab, etc.)
ai_prompt.output_format_intro: Output in the following JSON format:
ai_prompt.notes:
Important notes:
- spiciness and sweetness must be integers from 1 to 5
- If information is unknown, use empty lists for ingredients or allergens
- Do not include any text other than JSON
- Must output valid JSON format
ai_prompt.example_description: Thai-style stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, eggs, bean sprouts, and peanuts
